flags.message: Cell is marked forward-mode and event.yaml says resolved: false, but the provisioned snapshot (record/snapshots/2026-07-12.json) already contains the final order: on Oct 20 2025 the IFP motion was denied and the original habeas petition dismissed under Rule 39.8, with a Martin v. D.C. Court of Appeals filing bar. The case was decided ~9 months before this run; the event should be resolved and an outcome.json formed rather than predicted. This cell's prediction is determined by the provisioned baseline itself and carries no forward signal.

Outcome-knowledge disclosure per the predict-as-if-undecided rule: I encountered the disposition in the provisioned snapshot (not via retrieval). reasoning.md separately reasons from the pre-decision record only, and the pre-decision signals (pro se IFP original habeas petition, repeat abusive filer) independently compel the same call, but the evaluation should discount this cell.
